note: Primary explainer: the fake beluga-escape image, ~6 million views on one post, the Center's statement that it is false and likely AI-generated. Kaiti Grant (communications manager) quoted.
Second source: false AI-generated beluga-escape story got millions of views on social media last month.
Debunk: image rated ~82.6% likely AI by Hive Moderation; the fabricated narrative had the beluga escaping to reunite with her calf. Note: page title/date confirmed via fact-check; verify exact URL.
Corroborates the Center calling the image likely AI-generated and the calf-reunion framing.
Alaska TV corroboration of the fake spreading across social media.
Institution: located in Seward, Alaska; opened May 1998 (we render 'SINCE 1998' rather than the '25 years' phrasing in some coverage).
